series_description: Financial Statements from various Local Government Authority.a required document for loan approval.
retention_statement: Paper: need to keep a period of 5 years

series_description: Records with applications for loans completed by local governments including local government resolutions, contracts and meeting minutes.
retention_statement: Paper: until loan is repaid

series_description: Direct Purchase Orders, Requisitions and Other Documents Related to Purchase of Goods or Services.

series_description: Payroll Warrant Records and Payroll Disbursement Records
retention_statement: Paper: Retain until audited by Auditor of State and audit report is released and all discrepancies are resolved

series_description: Request for Stop, Release or Cancellation of Warrants.
retention_statement: Paper: Retain until audited by Auditor of State and audit report is released and all discrepancies are resolved

retention_statement: Paper: Retain until audited by Auditor of State and audit report is released and all discrepancies are resolved

retention_statement: Paper: Retain until audited by Auditor of State and audit report is released and all discrepancies are resolved

series_title: Accounting Entity Descriptions, Accounts Payable L
series_description: Accounting Entity Descriptions, Accounts Payable Ledgers and Accounts Receivable Ledgers
retention_statement: Paper: Retain until audited by Auditor of State and audit report is released and all discrepancies are resolved

series_title: Unsolicited Financial Proposals from Investment Ba
series_description: Records of proposals for water development systems that have not been solicited by the Authority.
retention_statement: Paper: Retain 2 years

series_description: Grant Applications and Related Documents
retention_statement: Paper: Retain for 1 year after grant is awarded and complete, or audits conducted and closeout documents are received

series_description: Used to submit specification for a printing job to State Printing and to encumber the dollars needed for the job.
retention_statement: Paper: Retain until audited by Auditor of State and audit report is released and all discrepancies are resolved

series_title: Revenue Receipts and Holding Account Redistributi
series_description: Used to deposit and record revenue receipts from any known revenue source and to hold unkown receipts for redistribution. Also used by agencies which have established a departmental holding fund from which revenue is redistributed or by any agency which receives revenue from an unknown source and deposits it to a fund using the revenue source hold.
retention_statement: Paper: Retain until audited by Auditor of State and audit report is released and all discrepancies are resolved

series_description: Copies of audit reports issued by the Auditor of State or federal government.
retention_statement: Paper: Retain 2 years

series_description: Vouchers and Voucher Journals
retention_statement: Paper: Retain until audited by Auditor of State and audit report released and all discrepancies are resolved

series_description: Includes mailing lists, directories, rosters, and registers compiled by an agency.
retention_statement: Paper: Retain until superseded, obsolete, or replaced

series_description: Forms and supporting documentation used to establish or modify telecommunications service.
retention_statement: Paper: Retain 2 years

series_description: Form initiated when salvaging a state vehicle. Describes condition of vehicle and lists accessories installed on vehicle.
retention_statement: Paper: Retain until audited by Auditor of State and audit report is released and all discrepancies are resolved

series_description: A form that is used to deposit, retrieve, return and destroy records stored off-site.
retention_statement: Paper: For deposits, destructions and returns, retain 2 years after transaction is completed

series_description: Records of funds that have been reserved for the completion of projects.
retention_statement: Paper: Retain 4 years

series_description: These are records of bonds issued by the Ohio Water Development Authority to pay part of the cost of water development projects. File may also contain renewal notes.
retention_statement: Paper: Retain until period of bond issue, until final bond maturity, or 25 years, whichever is longer

series_title: Bank Deposit Slips, Ledgers, Bank Statements, Canc
series_description: Bank Deposit Slips, Ledgers, Bank Statements, Cancelled Checks and Related Documents.
retention_statement: Paper: Retain until audited by Auditor of State and audit report is released and all discrepancies are resolved

series_description: Printed or recorded copies of public speeches given by representatives of state agencies.
retention_statement: Paper: Retain in agency until no longer of administrative value

series_description: Correspondence of the head of an agency dealing with significant aspects of the administration of their offices. Correspondence includes information concerning agency policies, procedures, program, fiscal and personnel matters.
retention_statement: Paper: Retain 2 years

series_description: Printed matter published by state agencies for distribution to the public.
retention_statement: Paper: Upon publication, fulfill the requirements of O.R.C. 149.11. Destroy excess copies when no longer of administrative value

series_description: Instructions issued by the Governor as te Chief Executive of State Government (originals on file permanently with Secretary of State).
retention_statement: Paper: Retain until superseded, obsolete, or replaced

series_description: Financial ledgers for the authority.
retention_statement: Paper: Retain 1 year after audited by Auditor of State and audit report is released

series_title: Application, Affidavit and Related Documents for R
series_description: Application, Affidavit and Related Documents for Replacement Warrants Never Received, Lost, Stolen, Destroyed, or Voided
retention_statement: Paper: Retain until audited by Auditor of State and audit report is released and all discrepancies are resolved

series_description: Employee investigations file.
retention_statement: Paper: Retain 3 years

series_description: Includes worksheets and information used to draft rules, JCARR proceedings, and transcripts of public hearings.
retention_statement: Paper: Retain 1 year after rule published

series_description: Copies of state and federal legislation of interest to an agency.
retention_statement: Paper: Retain until no longer of use

series_description: Minutes and supporting records documenting internal policy decisions.
retention_statement: Paper: Retain 2 years

series_description: Includes published reports, unpublished substantive reports and policy studies.
retention_statement: Paper: Retain until superseded, obsolete or replaced

series_description: Periodic Financial Statements
retention_statement: Paper: Retain 1 copy permanently

series_title: Postal Records, Registered Mail, Insured Mail Logs
series_description: Postal Records, Registered Mail, Insured Mail Logs
retention_statement: Paper: Retain 1 year

series_description: Maintenance and Repair of Buildings
retention_statement: Paper: Retain 2 years

series_description: Employee Discipline and Grievance Records
retention_statement: Paper: Retaion 7 years after case is closed

series_description: All records concerning federal grants to state agencies which document the expenditure and use of federal monies.
retention_statement: Paper: Retain until state and federal audits have been conducted, audit reports released, and audit resolutions issued or resolved

series_description: Formal opinions and infromal opinions issued to state agencies with all pertinent materials attached.
retention_statement: Paper: Retain until no longer of administrative or legal value to agency

series_description: Used for conducting an inventory of an agency's record series. Requests vital information to be used in determining the retention period and disposition of a record.
retention_statement: Paper: Retain until superseded by an updated inventory or until record series is no longer created

series_description: Delivery Slips and Packing Lists
retention_statement: Paper: Retain until no longer of administrative value

series_description: Used for the salvage of equipment or property of the State of Ohio.
retention_statement: Paper: Retain until audited by Auditor of State and audit report is released and all dicrepancies are resolved

series_title: All Bidding Documents, RFP's, RFQ's and Similar Do
series_description: All bidding documents, RFP's, RFQ's, and Similar Documents (purchasing construction, personnel services)
retention_statement: Paper: For sale of goods, retain five years

series_title: Lease Records of Lands or Buildings
series_description: Lease Records of Lands or Buildings
retention_statement: Paper: Fulfill the requirements of O.R.C. 117.49. Retain 2 years after expiration of lease

series_description: Capital Asset Records
retention_statement: Paper: Retain 2 years after asset is sold

series_description: Vacancy postings and applications, resumes, civil service applications and interview questions from applicants not hired.
retention_statement: Paper: Retain 7 years after position filled or decision not to fill the position is made

series_description: Organizational Charts
retention_statement: Paper: Retain until superseded, The current chart will be audited by Auditor of State

series_title: Civil Righrs and Title VII Files
series_description: Contains complaints and hearing information.
retention_statement: Paper: Retain 7 years

series_description: Affirmative Action Plans
retention_statement: Paper: Retain 2 years

series_description: Worksheets used for proposed budgets, legislative testimony and related documents.
retention_statement: Paper: Retain until budget is in effect

series_description: These are records of the loans for water development systems made to local government authority. These include technical specifications, contracts with contractors, payment made & repayment schedule.
retention_statement: Paper: Retain until after loan is paid off

series_description: Reqponses received from requests for bids or construction contracts for water development projects.
retention_statement: Paper: Retain 4 years

series_description: Forms used to enter into contract with an agency to request payment for services rendered or to amend contract.
retention_statement: Paper: Retain 5 years after expiration of contracts;

series_description: Publications produced by an agency detailing operations, regulations, and/or procedures of an agency.
retention_statement: Paper: Retain until superseded, obsolete, or replaced

series_description: Reports created by state agency staff or outside consultants concerning the management or operations of a state agency.
retention_statement: Paper: Retain until audited bu Auditor of State and audit report is released and all discrepancies are resolved

series_description: Includes negatives, prints, slides, transparencies, and related items.
retention_statement: Paper: Retain until information is no longer current

series_description: Includes exhibits, movies, and videotape productions.
retention_statement: Paper: Retain until information is no longer current

series_description: Documents status if on-going projects and issues; advises supervisors of various events and issues.
retention_statement: Paper: Retain 1 year

series_description: Includes internal correspondence (letters, memos); also, correspondence from various individuals, companies, and organizations requesting information pertaining to agency and legal interpretations and other miscellaneous inquiries. This correspondence is informative (it does not attempt to influence agency policy).
retention_statement: Paper: Retain 1 year

series_description: Contract Encumbrances, Procurements, Complaints to Vendors, and Related Contract Documents.
retention_statement: Paper: For sale of goods, retain five years after contract expires

series_description: Employee Personnel Files
retention_statement: Paper: Retain 7 years after employee leaves employment

series_title: Employee FMLA, EAP, Disability and Workers Compens
series_description: Employee FMLA, EAP, Disability and Workers Compensation Records.
retention_statement: Paper: Retain 7 years after employee separation

series_description: Timesheets, leave requests, etc.
retention_statement: Paper: Retain until audited by Auditor of State and audit report is released and all discrepancies are resolved

series_description: Requests for outside agency (Highway Patrol, Auditor, EOD, etc.) to investigate an employee. Includes request, referral, and any attached documentation including preliminary investigation before the referral.
retention_statement: Paper: Retain 1 year after completion of investigation or decision not to investigate

series_title: Accident, Health and Safety Records, Incident Repo
series_description: Accident, Health and Safety Records, Incident Reports, OSHA Reports, etc.
retention_statement: Paper: Retain 5 years

series_description: All information used to prepare division budget, copies of all correspondence received and sent regarding budget.
retention_statement: Paper: Retain for one budget period following end of current period

series_description: Official minutes, orders and decisions of a state agency, commission, board, or council.
retention_statement: Paper: Retain 2 years

series_description: Referral letters, requests for routine information or publications provided to the public by an agency which are answered by standard from letters.
retention_statement: Paper: Retain 6 months

series_description: Deed Records, Real Property
retention_statement: Paper: Retain for 1 year after permanently recorded with county auditor

series_description: Internal form used to obtain authorization for out-of-state travel for a state employee.
retention_statement: Paper: Retain until audited by Auditor of State and audit report is released and all discrepancies are resolveed

series_title: Civil Service Exam Announcements, Cover Sheet Posi
series_description: Civil Service Exam Announcements, Cover Sheet Position Descriptions and Position Descriptions
retention_statement: Paper: Retain until superseded, replaced or obsolete

series_description: Manuals produced by an agency for internal personnel training.
retention_statement: Paper: Retain until superseded, obsolete, or replaced

series_description: Temporary Personnel Contracts
retention_statement: Paper: Retain 7 years after the expiration of contracts

series_title: Telephone Logs, Bills and Call Records
series_description: Listing of long distance calls made by agency personnel for a particular time period.
retention_statement: Paper: Retain until audited by Auditor of State and audit report is released and all dicrepancies are resolved

series_title: Financial Disclosure Statements and Joint Legislat
series_description: Financial Disclosure Statements and Joint Legislative and Ethics Commission "JLEC" Statements
retention_statement: Paper: Retain 2 years

series_description: Annual financial statements for the Water Development Authority.
retention_statement: Paper: Retain 1 copy permanently. Send 1 copy of the statements to the State Archive

series_description: Includes news/press releases and bulletins issued by an agency.
retention_statement: Paper: Retain in agency until no longer of administrative value

series_description: Bill for goods shipped or services rendered. They are matched with purchase orders and receiving reports, and attached to vouchers for payment.
retention_statement: Paper: Retain until audited by Auditor of State and audit report is released, and all discrepancies are resolved

series_description: Appraisals, encumbrances, fund transfers, plans, resolutions, Attorney General's opinions, contracts and any other original documents related to the acquisition of real property by the State of Ohio through O.R.C. 127.13 or other O.R.C. sections.
retention_statement: Paper: Retain permanently with the original instrument filed pursuant to O.R.C. 117.49. Retain photocopies in agency until property conveyed

series_description: A form used to identify the length of time a record must be retained before final disposition.
retention_statement: Paper: Retain until superseded by a revised retention schedule, or until record series is no longer maintained

series_description: Form used to certify the destruction or transfer of records according to approved records retention schedules.
retention_statement: Paper: Retain 2 years

series_description: Used for claiming reimbursement for in-state and out-of-state travel.
retention_statement: Paper: Retain until audited by Auditor of Strate and audit report is released and all discrepancies are resolved

series_description: Bond Registers
retention_statement: Paper: Retain 10 years fater final call date

series_description: Also includes other published periodic reports on agency activities.
retention_statement: Paper: Upon publication, fulfill the requirements of O.R.C. 149.11. Destroy excess copies when no longer of administrative value

series_description: Includes service records, compilation sheets, operation maintenance reports of licensed vehicles, warranty and guaranty statements, operating manual, reports and shop-work orders, accident reports, repair records, mileage and usage logs, etc.
retention_statement: Paper: Retain during ownership of vehicle

series_description: Employee Training Records, Workforce Development, Tuition Reimbursement and Other Education Assistance Program Records
retention_statement: Paper: Retain 2 years

series_description: Bonds and Bond Coupons, Redeemed
retention_statement: Paper: Retain auntil audited by Auditor of State and audit report is released and all discrepancies are resolved

series_description: Records documenting the entry and departure of employees and visitors into a State office building during and/or after office hours.
retention_statement: Paper: Retain 1 year
